top_signals.title: Three supertankers attempt Hormuz crossing after Iran tightens controls
top_signals.summary: Vessels bound for China and South Korea are carrying 6mn barrels of crude oil
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia’s Radical Export Experiment Upends Its Commodity Trade
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s radical plan to take control of key commodity exports has left the country’s coal miners, palm-oil producers and traders racing to understand details of a policy that throws into upheaval one of the country’s biggest industries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Cybercrime service disrupted for abusing Microsoft platform to sign malware
top_signals.summary: Microsoft says it has disrupted a malware-signing-as-a-service (MSaaS) operation that abused the company's Artifact Signing service to generate fraudulent code-signing certificates used by ransomware gangs and other cybercriminals. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
